documentation.value:
Defines a set of named constants.

```typescript
enum Direction {
  Up = 'UP',
  Down = 'DOWN',
  Left = 'LEFT',
  Right = 'RIGHT'
}
```

Constructs a type with all properties set to `readonly`.

```typescript
const config: Readonly<Config> = { port: 3000 };
config.port = 8080; // Error!
```

Constructs a type by picking the set of properties `Keys` from `Type`.

```typescript
type TodoPreview = Pick<Todo, 'title' | 'completed'>;
```

Constructs a type by removing the set of properties `Keys` from `Type`.

```typescript
type TodoInfo = Omit<Todo, 'completed' | 'createdAt'>;
```

Constructs a type by excluding from `UnionType` all members that are assignable to `Excluded`.

```typescript
type T = Exclude<'a' | 'b' | 'c', 'a'>; // 'b' | 'c'
```

Constructs a type by extracting from `Type` all union members assignable to `Union`.

```typescript
type T = Extract<'a' | 'b' | 'c', 'a' | 'f'>; // 'a'
```

Constructs a type by excluding `null` and `undefined` from `Type`.

```typescript
type T = NonNullable<string | null | undefined>; // string
```

Constructs a tuple type from the types of the parameters of a function type.

```typescript
type T = Parameters<(a: string, b: number) => void>; // [string, number]
```

Recursively unwraps the `Awaited` type of a `Promise`.

```typescript
type A = Awaited<Promise<string>>; // string
type B = Awaited<Promise<Promise<number>>>; // number
```

Produces a union of the property names (keys) of a type.

```typescript
interface User { id: number; name: string; }
type UserKeys = keyof User; // 'id' | 'name'
```

Selects one of two types based on a condition.

```typescript
type IsString<T> = T extends string ? true : false;
type A = IsString<'hello'>; // true
type B = IsString<42>;      // false
```

Infers a type within a conditional type.

```typescript
type UnpackPromise<T> = T extends Promise<infer U> ? U : T;
type A = UnpackPromise<Promise<string>>; // string
```

Converts each character in the string to uppercase.

```typescript
type T = Uppercase<'hello'>; // 'HELLO'
```

Converts each character in the string to lowercase.

```typescript
type T = Lowercase<'HELLO'>; // 'hello'
```

Converts the first character in the string to uppercase.

```typescript
type T = Capitalize<'hello'>; // 'Hello'
```

Extracts parameter types from a constructor function type.

```typescript
type T = ConstructorParameters<typeof Date>;
```

Constructs a type consisting of the instance type of a constructor function.

```typescript
type D = InstanceType<typeof Date>; // Date
```

Prevents TypeScript from inferring a type parameter from this position.

```typescript
function createFSM<S extends string>(init: S, transitions: Record<S, NoInfer<S>[]>) { }
```

Insert a JSX element.

```tsx
<section className="container">Content</section>
```

Declare component state with a type parameter.

```tsx
const [count, setCount] = useState<number>(0);
```
